body:
A former 2000s scene kid trans girl wakes up from top surgery.

She realizes the fat transfer did not give her the volume she was hoping for, which means she’ll need to get implants.

She looks at her doctor and says:

I guess it’ll be at least one night and one more time, but thanks for the mammeries!
